attempts.last_message_excerpt: {"title":"lit local VCS prototype","summary":"First stabilize the shared `.lit` repository model and command architecture so later work can land without merge-heavy refactors. Then split the feature build into two parallel tracks: one for branch and checkout-style navigation, and one for merge/rebase plus conflict handling. After those converge, finish the prototype with integration-style CLI tests and, in parallel, publish a concise README and a simple static English website that explains th...
